title: Vivi Searches for the Shooter
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on vivi searches for the shooter, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi Searches for the Shooter. Vivi and the crew continue the desperate hunt for the shooter and the bomb as the countdown shrinks. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: How the hell did he escape from the quicksand with those wounds...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: See! See! What'd I tell ya! I knew all along!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Is that really the face of a person who knew "all along?"

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Vivi, my love! I can't believe how horribly injured you are!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Who the hell asked you to create a toy for parties!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You're standing just fine right now!

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: B-but... I still included that one ultimate attack...!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Ughh... chopper... I have a final request...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: b... bury my body in the wilder- mess...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Vivi! What's the situation!? And what is up with this freaky dust storm!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'll kick your ass for letting Nami get injured!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: She's looking just fine right now though...

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: Sorry, guys. I lost to him once.

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: But I won't lose again! So take care of the rest in the meanwhile!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Hurry up and beat his ass already...

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: If you can't beat him, then who can!?

summary: This part develops vivi searches for the shooter and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
